response:
for x between 3 and 6, the inequality is 2x cubed minus 5x squared plus 3x minus 7 greater than or equal to 10. the valid range includes all x values from 3 inches to 6 inches since the polynomial increases strictly in this interval.
******
solving 2x cubed minus 5x squared plus 3x minus 7 equals 15 yields one real solution near 3.4 inches. the other two solutions are complex numbers and thus physically impossible for screen width measurements.
